backward_compatibility.rationale: Q1:A — getBestScore() reads dead localStorage key yen-go-rush-best-score that nothing writes. Remove and use getRushHighScore() from progress system.

legacy_code_removal.rationale: Q1:A — Remove getBestScore(), RushPuzzle type, InlinePuzzleSolver, RushPuzzleRenderer from app.tsx. Move to dedicated modules.

option_selection.rationale: Unanimous governance approval. Only option satisfying both SRP and DRY charter constraints. Phase A pure refactor is zero-risk. Phase B on clean modules enables clear AC traceability.
